42.title: Schema Change in raw_events
42.root_cause: Column type change in raw_events.age (INT to STRING) broke the age_bucket feature transformation, causing churn_model_v3 to degrade from 89% to 71% accuracy.

55.title: Feature Drift in Fraud Detection Model
55.root_cause: Feature drift in transaction_amount distribution — PSI=0.34 (threshold 0.2). Fraud patterns shifted after promotion event caused unusual spending behavior.
